caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

💫Whimzeyland in Safety Harbor, Florida, is truly a magical place to explore and easily earned a spot in the Fairytale Places in Florida series! 

💫Whimzeyland is located at 📍1206 3rd St. N, Safety Harbor, Florida 34695 and is a short stop (takes about an hour to explore) so add it to a day trip to Tampa, St. Petersburg or Clearwater! 

#safetyharbourflorida #whimzyland #outdoormuseumsflorida #uniqueflorida #hiddengemsflorida

transcription.text: Fairytale Places in Florida Part 4. When you were a kid, did you ever fantasize about shrinking down to play in the Candyland board game? Maybe I'm weird, but I did and I found a place that feels just like that right here in Florida. Welcome to Whimsyland, located in Safety Harbor, Florida. Whimsyland is a one-of-a-kind home owned by two artists who have spent decades turning a regular home into Whimsyland. The artists have opened their property for people to explore and immerse themselves in a whimsical wonderland for free. You'll find mosaic sidewalks to stroll, over 900 bowling balls, interesting sculptures including Spongebob, and all kinds of other oddities like this Volkswagen Beetle to surprise you around every corner and in every nook and cranny. Whimsyland has been famously named the bowling ball house and was featured on HDTV Extreme Homes and MTV Cribs. You can check out this entire property in about an hour, so it's a great add-on to a day trip to the Tampa Bay or St. Petersburg area. Be sure to save this post and send it to a friend you would want to go here with and follow for more Florida content from a local.
